channel.title: AI Press Review — Social Feed (EN+FR)
channel.description: Merged bilingual feed for LinkedIn distribution. Each item carries LinkedIn-ready copy — short summary, listen link, hashtags.

item.title: Anthropic's 80x Compute Surge, OpenAI's MRC Protocol, and DeepSeek's $45B Valuation
item.description:
Anthropic's 80x Compute Surge, OpenAI's MRC Protocol, and DeepSeek's $45B Valuation
Anthropic seized the full capacity of SpaceX's Colossus-1 data center — over 220,000 Nvidia GPUs and 300 megawatts — after its compute demand grew 80x, while simultaneously unveiling financial…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-05-08.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Pentagon Signs Seven AI Firms, Big Tech Hits $725B Spend, GitHub Copilot Goes Per-Token
item.description:
Pentagon Signs Seven AI Firms, Big Tech Hits $725B Spend, GitHub Copilot Goes Per-Token
The Pentagon signed AI agreements with seven companies — including OpenAI, Google, Nvidia, and SpaceX — for any-lawful-use military deployment, while Anthropic was notably absent after refusing that…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-05-03.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: OpenAI on AWS, Anthropic at $900B: the cloud war heats up — Apr 30
item.description:
OpenAI on AWS, Anthropic at $900B: the cloud war heats up — Apr 30
OpenAI dissolved its exclusivity with Microsoft and landed on Amazon's Bedrock platform the following day, while Anthropic is fielding pre-emptive funding offers that would value it at up to 900…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-30.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: OpenAI vs. Amazon: cloud war reshapes enterprise AI — Apr 29
item.description:
OpenAI vs. Amazon: cloud war reshapes enterprise AI — Apr 29
OpenAI missed its internal revenue and user targets for Q1 2026 while simultaneously breaking free of Microsoft's cloud exclusivity to land on Amazon Bedrock, reshaping enterprise AI distribution…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-29.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: OpenAI acquiert Hiro Finance : la finance IA en mouvement — 16 avr
item.description:
OpenAI acquiert Hiro Finance : la finance IA en mouvement — 16 avr
OpenAI renforce sa présence dans la finance avec l'acquisition de Hiro Finance, tandis que Lightelligence prépare son IPO en Chine, signalant une accélération dans les puces photoniques.
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-16.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA

item.title: Puces IA : la Chine proche du 2nm face aux USA — 15 avr
item.description:
Puces IA : la Chine proche du 2nm face aux USA — 15 avr
La Chine se rapproche de la production de puces IA en 2nm via la start-up Dishan Technology. Greg Brockman d'OpenAI prédit une transformation de la productivité des équipes grâce à l'IA, tandis que…
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-15.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA

item.title: Agents IA : Le déploiement s'accélère, la performance suit ? — 15 avr
item.description:
Agents IA : Le déploiement s'accélère, la performance suit ? — 15 avr
Google DeepMind spécialise son IA pour les robots du monde réel avec Gemini Robotics 1.6, tandis qu'OpenAI poursuit ses acquisitions dans la finance.
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-15.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA
